form.formComment: Comes here off a 50-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 10 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on February 19 over 1673m, 25 len behind Bernabeu carrying 52.5kg at $82.90. The start before that eased back early on 8th of 11 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on January 15 over 1673m, 20 len behind Liam's Song with 56kg at $40.90. Solid prospects and a good barrier doesn?t hurt.
